feat.name: Advanced Field Training
feat.text: You gain a commander feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your commander level is equal to half your character level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.special: You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another commander feat.
